columns.name: TaxKeyword
columns.description: Enterprise Keywords are shared with other users and applications to allow for ease of search and filtering, as well as metadata consistency and reuse

columns.name: RatingCount
columns.description: Number of ratings submitted

columns.name: _DCDateModified
columns.description: The date on which this resource was last modified

columns.name: _Author
columns.description: The primary author

columns.name: XSLStyleIconUrl
columns.description: A 64x48 icon that represents this style

columns.name: HealthRuleCheckEnabled
columns.description: If selected, SharePoint will periodically look for this problem.

columns.name: CompatibleManagedProperties
columns.description: Enter the names of the managed properties that you would like to use this Filter Display Template with. The managed properties with names that start with the values you enter will be able to use this Display Template.

columns.name: ManagedPropertyMapping
columns.description: Enter the slots and the managed properties that map to the slots. This field will be used to determine which managed properties are retrieved from SharePoint Search when you are using this Display Template. Use the format "slot name":"property name", separated by commas.

columns.name: DisplayTemplateJSTargetListTemplate
columns.description: ID of the list template type this override applies to.

columns.name: CrawlerXSLFile
columns.description: Add an XSL file to be used to generate HTML when crawlers are viewing the page.

columns.name: HealthReportServices
columns.description: The services for which the health analyzer rule failed.

columns.name: _Relation
columns.description: References to related resources

columns.name: HealthRuleVersion
columns.description: Version

columns.name: HealthRuleAutoRepairEnabled
columns.description: If Repair Automatically is selected, SharePoint will attempt to repair errors as soon as they are found.

columns.name: _Identifier
columns.description: An identifying string or number, usually conforming to a formal identification system

columns.name: XSLStyleWPType
columns.description: Specify the type of web part this style is intended for.  For default list views, choose XSLTListViewWebPart.

columns.name: _ResourceType
columns.description: A set of categories, functions, genres or aggregation levels

columns.name: DisplayTemplateJSTargetControlType
columns.description: Type of control defined in this Display Template.

columns.name: HealthRuleReportLink
columns.description: A link to the settings page that controls if and when this rule is run.

columns.name: _Contributor
columns.description: One or more people or organizations that contributed to this resource

columns.name: DisplayTemplateLevel
columns.description: Select the level of data that this display template expects and is designed to display.  This determines where this template will appear as a selectable option in configuration UIs.

columns.name: XSLStyleRequiredFields
columns.description: The required fields for this style in the format: field1; field2;

columns.name: CanvasContent1
columns.description: This column stores the content of the authoring canvas in a site page.

columns.name: TargetControlType
columns.description: Select the search controls that will use this Display Template.

columns.name: IsQuestion
columns.description: I am asking a question and want to get answers from other members.

columns.name: HealthRuleSchedule
columns.description: Determines when the rules are checked automatically

columns.name: CompatibleSearchDataTypes
columns.description: Select the Search managed property data types that this Filter Display Template will be used with. If you don't enter any values, the Display Template will be available for all data types.

columns.name: HealthReportServers
columns.description: The servers on which the health analyzer rule failed during the most recent execution.

columns.name: HealthReportRemedy
columns.description: Steps which may be taken to resolve the reported problem

columns.name: AverageRating
columns.description: Average value of all the ratings that have been submitted

columns.name: DisplayTemplateJSTemplateType
columns.description: Option to include this override during view selection.

columns.name: XSLStyleBaseView
columns.description: The view style ID for this style

columns.name: _Publisher
columns.description: The person, organization or service that published this resource

columns.name: _Coverage
columns.description: The extent or scope

columns.name: _Comments
columns.description: A summary of this resource

columns.name: HealthReportSeverity
columns.description: The severity of the reported problem

columns.name: HealthRuleScope
columns.description: The rule scope determines where the rule file is run. If the rule scope is set to All, the rule file will run on all computers with the specified service. If the rule scope is set to Any, the rule file will run on the first available computer with the specified service.

columns.name: DisplayTemplateJSIconUrl
columns.description: Icon to be displayed for this override.

columns.name: _RightsManagement
columns.description: Information about rights held in or over this resource

columns.name: HealthReportSeverityIcon
columns.description: The severity of the reported problem

columns.name: LayoutWebpartsContent
columns.description: This column stores the content of webparts in page layout in a site page.

columns.name: _Source
columns.description: References to resources from which this resource was derived

columns.name: _Format
columns.description: Media-type, file format or dimensions

columns.name: _DCDateCreated
columns.description: The date on which this resource was created

columns.name: DisplayTemplateJSTargetScope
columns.description: URL of the website this override applies to.

columns.name: HealthReportExplanation
columns.description: A detailed explanation of the reported problem

columns.name: TemplateHidden
columns.description: Hide this Display Template where people select from an available list of search Display Templates.

columns.name: HealthReportCategory
columns.description: The category of the reported problem

columns.name: DisplayTemplateJSTemplateHidden
columns.description: Hide this Display Template option when creating new views.

columns.name: XSLStyleCategory
columns.description: The category or content types compatible with this style

headers.content-security-policy-report-only: default-src 'self' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://connect.nango.dev;child-src 'self';connect-src 'self' https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.sentry.io https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev wss://api.nango.dev/ https://connect.nango.dev https://*.posthog.com https://*.stripe.com;font-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com;frame-src 'self' https://accounts.google.com https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://connect.nango.dev https://www.youtube.com https://*.stripe.com;img-src 'self' data: https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.posthog.com https://img.logo.dev https://*.ytimg.com;manifest-src 'self';media-src 'self';object-src 'self';script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.stripe.com https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://apis.google.com https://*.posthog.com https://www.youtube.com;style-src blob: 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.googleapis.com https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev;worker-src blob: 'self' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.googleapis.com https://*.posthog.com;base-uri 'self';form-action 'self';frame-ancestors 'self';script-src-attr 'none';upgrade-insecure-requests
headers.access-control-expose-headers: Authorization, Etag, Content-Type, Content-Length, X-Nango-Signature, X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset
